opportunities.title: [HIRING] logo design for small business, $50
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] logo design for small business, $50

I'm starting up a boutique-type small business in the middle of a rural town in Mexico selling cutesy novelty things like stationary, stickers/washi tape, squishies, korean face masks, chopsticks with chopsticks rests, hand towel, house accessories like cherry shaped toilet brushes. You get the idea. I'm the only Korean person in town (besides my tween daughter) which I want to capitalize on. I'd prefer a logo mixing Korean and Mexican/yucatecan culture. I'm very open to ideas if you have any. Inspirations include Chuu Clothing, Peiliee, LoveShackF

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Hiring Remote Technical Talent — Client-Facing Engineering/Support Role in LATAM
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Hiring Remote Technical Talent — Client-Facing Engineering/Support Role in LATAM

Job Title: Technical Specialist / Technical Support Engineer Location: Remote (LATAM) Employment Type: Contract / Flexible Remote Work Compensation: $20–$50/hour We are looking for a technically skilled and highly adaptable professional to join our team. This role is ideal for someone with a background in software engineering, technical support, or another technical field who enjoys communication, problem-solving, and working with clients or internal teams.
